name: dnsx
title: dnsx

commands.name: dnsx

arguments.description: list of sub(domains)/hosts to resolve (file or stdin)
arguments.raw: -l, -list string      list of sub(domains)/hosts to resolve (file or stdin)

arguments.description: list of domain to bruteforce (file or comma separated or stdin)
arguments.raw: -d, -domain string    list of domain to bruteforce (file or comma separated or stdin)

arguments.description: list of words to bruteforce (file or comma separated or stdin)
arguments.raw: -w, -wordlist string  list of words to bruteforce (file or comma separated or stdin)

arguments.description: dns query type to exclude (a,aaaa,cname,ns,txt,srv,ptr,mx,soa,axfr,caa) (default none)
arguments.raw: -e, -exclude-type value  dns query type to exclude (a,aaaa,cname,ns,txt,srv,ptr,mx,soa,axfr,caa) (default none)

arguments.description: filter result by dns status code (eg. -rcode noerror,servfail,refused)
arguments.raw: -rc, -rcode string                  filter result by dns status code (eg. -rcode noerror,servfail,refused)

arguments.description: return entries with no records for the specified query types (e.g., a, cname)
arguments.raw: -rtf, -response-type-filter string  return entries with no records for the specified query types (e.g., a, cname)

arguments.description: number of concurrent threads to use (default 100)
arguments.raw: -t, -threads int      number of concurrent threads to use (default 100)

arguments.description: number of dns request/second to make (disabled as default) (default -1)
arguments.raw: -rl, -rate-limit int  number of dns request/second to make (disabled as default) (default -1)

arguments.description: omit raw dns response from jsonl output
arguments.raw: -omit-raw, -or      omit raw dns response from jsonl output

arguments.description: display only results in the output
arguments.raw: -silent             display only results in the output

arguments.description: display stats of the running scan
arguments.raw: -stats              display stats of the running scan

arguments.description: number of dns attempts to make (must be at least 1) (default 2)
arguments.raw: -retry int                number of dns attempts to make (must be at least 1) (default 2)
-trace-max-recursion int  Max recursion for dns trace (default 255)

arguments.description: stream mode (wordlist, wildcard, stats and stop/resume will be disabled)
arguments.raw: -stream                   stream mode (wordlist, wildcard, stats and stop/resume will be disabled)

arguments.description: maximum time to wait for a DNS query to complete (default 3s)
arguments.raw: -timeout value            maximum time to wait for a DNS query to complete (default 3s)

arguments.description: configure ProjectDiscovery Cloud Platform (PDCP) api key (default true)
arguments.raw: -auth                         configure ProjectDiscovery Cloud Platform (PDCP) api key (default true)

arguments.description: list of resolvers to use (file or comma separated)
arguments.raw: -r, -resolver string          list of resolvers to use (file or comma separated)

arguments.description: domain name for wildcard filtering (other flags will be ignored - only json output is supported)
arguments.raw: -wd, -wildcard-domain string  domain name for wildcard filtering (other flags will be ignored - only json output is supported)

commands.raw_help:
root@kali:~# dnsx -h
 dnsx is a fast and multi-purpose DNS toolkit allow to run multiple probes using retryabledns library.
 
 Usage:
 dnsx [flags]
 
 Flags:
 INPUT:
  -l, -list string      list of sub(domains)/hosts to resolve (file or stdin)
  -d, -domain string    list of domain to bruteforce (file or comma separated or stdin)
  -w, -wordlist string  list of words to bruteforce (file or comma separated or stdin)
 
 QUERY:
  -a                       query A record (default)
  -aaaa                    query AAAA record
  -cname                   query CNAME record
  -ns                      query NS record
  -txt                     query TXT record
  -srv                     query SRV record
  -ptr                     query PTR record
  -mx                      query MX record
  -soa                     query SOA record
  -any                     query ANY record
  -axfr                    query AXFR
  -caa                     query CAA record
  -all, -recon             query all the dns records (a,aaaa,cname,ns,txt,srv,ptr,mx,soa,axfr,caa)
  -e, -exclude-type value  dns query type to exclude (a,aaaa,cname,ns,txt,srv,ptr,mx,soa,axfr,caa) (default none)
 
 FILTER:
  -re, -resp                          display dns response
  -ro, -resp-only                     display dns response only
  -rc, -rcode string                  filter result by dns status code (eg. -rcode noerror,servfail,refused)
  -rtf, -response-type-filter string  return entries with no records for the specified query types (e.g., a, cname)
 
 PROBE:
  -cdn  display cdn name
  -asn  display host asn information
 
 RATE-LIMIT:
  -t, -threads int      number of concurrent threads to use (default 100)
  -rl, -rate-limit int  number of dns request/second to make (disabled as default) (default -1)
 
 UPDATE:
  -up, -update                 update dnsx to latest version
  -duc, -disable-update-check  disable automatic dnsx update check
 
 OUTPUT:
  -o, -output string  file to write output
  -j, -json           write output in JSONL(ines) format
  -omit-raw, -or      omit raw dns response from jsonl output
 
 DEBUG:
  -hc, -health-check  run diagnostic check up
  -silent             display only results in the output
  -v, -verbose        display verbose output
  -raw, -debug        display raw dns response
  -stats              display stats of the running scan
  -version            display version of dnsx
  -nc, -no-color      disable color in output
 
 OPTIMIZATION:
  -retry int                number of dns attempts to make (must be at least 1) (default 2)
  -hf, -hostsfile           use system host file
  -trace                    perform dns tracing
  -trace-max-recursion int  Max recursion for dns trace (default 255)
  -resume                   resume existing scan
  -stream                   stream mode (wordlist, wildcard, stats and stop/resume will be disabled)
  -timeout value            maximum time to wait for a DNS query to complete (default 3s)
 
 CONFIGURATIONS:
  -auth                         configure ProjectDiscovery Cloud Platform (PDCP) api key (default true)
  -r, -resolver string          list of resolvers to use (file or comma separated)
  -wt, -wildcard-threshold int  wildcard filter threshold (default 5)
  -wd, -wildcard-domain string  domain name for wildcard filtering (other flags will be ignored - only json output is supported)
  -proxy string                 proxy to use (eg socks5://127.0.0.1:8080)

examples.command: dnsx is a fast and multi-purpose DNS toolkit allow to run multiple probes using retryabledns library.

local_help.--help:
dnsx is a fast and multi-purpose DNS toolkit allow to run multiple probes using retryabledns library.

Usage:

Flags:
INPUT:

   -srv                     query SRV record
   -ptr                     query PTR record

   -any                     query ANY record
   -axfr                    query AXFR
   -caa                     query CAA record
   -all, -recon             query all the dns records (a,aaaa,cname,ns,txt,srv,ptr,mx,soa,axfr,caa)
   -e, -exclude-type value  dns query type to exclude (a,aaaa,cname,ns,txt,srv,ptr,mx,soa,axfr,caa) (default none)

FILTER:
   -re, -resp                          display dns response

   -rtf, -response-type-filter string  return entries with no records for the specified query types (e.g., a, cname)

PROBE:

RATE-LIMIT:

OUTPUT:

   -hf, -hostsfile           use system host file
   -trace                    perform dns tracing
   -trace-max-recursion int  Max recursion for dns trace (default 255)
   -resume                   resume existing scan
   -stream                   stream mode (wordlist, wildcard, stats and stop/resume will be disabled)
   -timeout value            maximum time to wait for a DNS query to complete (default 3s)

CONFIGURATIONS:
   -auth                         configure ProjectDiscovery Cloud Platform (PDCP) api key (default true)
   -r, -resolver string          list of resolvers to use (file or comma separated)
   -wt, -wildcard-threshold int  wildcard filter threshold (default 5)
   -wd, -wildcard-domain string  domain name for wildcard filtering (other flags will be ignored - only json output is supported)
   -proxy string                 proxy to use (eg socks5://127.0.0.1:8080)

apt_metadata.description:
perform multiple dns queries
This package contains a fast and multi-purpose DNS toolkit allow to run
multiple probes using retryabledns library, that allows you to perform
multiple DNS queries of your choice with a list of user supplied resolvers,
additionally supports DNS wildcard filtering like shuffledns
(https://github.com/projectdiscovery/shuffledns).
.
Features
* Simple and Handy utility to query DNS records
* Supports A, AAAA, CNAME, PTR, NS, MX, TXT, SOA
* Supports DNS Status Code probing
* Supports DNS Tracing
* Handles wildcard subdomains in automated way.
* Stdin and stdout support to work with other tools.
